# Workflow: Data Pipeline

## Trigger
Need data ingestion

## Objective
Reliable data flow

## Inputs
- Data source

## Outputs
- Clean structured data

## Steps
1. Connect source
2. Extract data
3. Transform data
4. Validate data
5. Store in DB
6. Schedule jobs
7. Monitor pipeline

## Failure Handling
- Retry failed jobs
- Log errors

## Deliverables
- Data pipeline
